articles.title: Israeli forces detain five Palestinians, including two children, in occupied West Bank
articles.summary: Israeli forces detain five Palestinians, including two children, in occupied West Bank Israeli forces on Monday evening detained five Palestinians, including two children, during a raid on the village of Kisan, east of Bethlehem in the occupied West Bank, according to a report from Wafa news agency. Head of Kisan village council, Bakr Rashaydeh, told Wafa news that Israeli forces raided the village and searched several Palestinian homes before detaining five residents, including two children aged 15 and 16.

articles.title: Saudi-led coalition in Yemen says it will respond to Houthi's threats to ships with force
articles.summary: Saudi-led coalition in Yemen says it will respond to Houthi's threats to ships with force The Saudi-led coalition in Yemen said on Monday that it will respond to Houthis' threats to ships with "force" after the Yemeni group declared a naval blockade on the kingdom. The coalition said in a statement that it has begun to implement safety measures for its ships passing through the Bab el-Mandeb Strait. In a statement from Saudi Arabia's foreign ministry, the country also condemned the Houthis' naval blockade and called its accusations that Saudi Arabia is "besieging" the Yemeni people "baseless".

articles.summary: US Centcom says it has launched new round of strikes on Iran The US military announced on Monday that it has began a new round of strikes against Iran. "The strikes are designed to further degrade Iranian military capabilities used to attack commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz," US Central Command (Centcom) wrote in a post to X. Today at 4 p.m. ET, U.S. forces began a new round of strikes against Iran at the Commander in Chief's direction.
